recommendations.title: Bacon on the Side
recommendations.overview: Djalil Boudaoud and Justine Lacroix are a surgeon and a television reporter who enter a romantic relationship despite the objections of their families to the cultural gap.

recommendations.title: Ashby
recommendations.overview: When new kid in town Ed Wallis is given an assignment to interview an older person, he turns to his mysterious neighbor, Ashby Holt for help.  That new connection leads to unexpected journeys for both of them, as Ashby – who turns out to be a retired

recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.

recommendations.title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
recommendations.overview: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion. As their bond grows deeper, a beautiful relationship unfolds.

recommendations.title: Make Me Believe
recommendations.overview: Two meddling grannies trick their adult grandkids into a meet-cute that reignites a childhood crush and old grudges.

recommendations.title: The Moment You Fall in Love
recommendations.overview: Following Natsuki Enomoto's confession rehearsals with Yuu Setoguchi, their younger siblings Kotarou and Hina struggle to confess their own love. Despite a disastrous first meeting in middle school with her upperclassman Koyuki Ayase, Hina’s heart is

recommendations.title: #realityhigh
recommendations.overview: When nerdy high schooler Dani finally attracts the interest of her longtime crush, she lands in the cross hairs of his ex, a social media celebrity.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.
